input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: if multiple panels are used, gaps between panels must not exceed 3 mm

final_answer: If multiple panels are used, gaps between panels must not exceed 3 mm
